landing.newsletterPrivacy: Your email will only be used for newsletter purposes.
landing.faq1Q: Does Orgcell connect with my Google Drive and actually store my photos?
landing.faq1A: Not a single pixel of your photos or videos is stored on Orgcell's servers. We only hold the family tree structure and folder label information. Your actual family photos and precious files are stored 100% in your own Google Drive (Google's servers). Orgcell is just the frame — the photos always stay in your vault (Google).
landing.faq2Q: Does Orgcell see my Google ID or password when I log in?
landing.faq2A: Orgcell cannot see your Google password. The login window is the real Google (Google.com) official login page. After login, Google only gives us a temporary 'access token'. Your password is never exposed, and you can revoke Orgcell's access anytime from your Google account settings.
landing.faq3Q: Can a child's independent Family Website connect back to the parent family?
landing.faq3A: A child can have an independent domain (e.g., child.orgcell.com) created with their own account. When a parent links the child's domain in the family tree and the child approves, a 'Wormhole routing' between the two Google Drives opens, enabling seamless navigation between each other's museums.
landing.review1Text: I had thousands of photos of my kids and the AI sorted them perfectly by person. I was skeptical at first, but now the whole family checks in every day.
landing.review2Text: I made a family domain for $10/year, and my parents overseas can instantly see photos of their grandkids. More convenient than any messenger app.
landing.review3Text: I already had photos organized in Google Drive, so I just connected them and they instantly looked like a museum. No file moving needed — super convenient.
landing.faq4Q: How much does it cost? Are there extra charges?
landing.faq4A: A family museum domain is $10 per year. Adding members, AI sorting, photo sharing — all unlimited with no extra fees. No hidden charges whatsoever.
landing.faq5A: Subscriptions renew annually, and you can cancel anytime before the next billing date. After cancellation, you continue to have access until the current subscription period ends.
landing.faq6Q: How many family members can I invite?
landing.faq6A: There is no limit on the number of family members. Send invitations simply by email or link. Invited family members can view and share photos for free.
landing.faq7Q: Does it work well on smartphones?
landing.faq7A: Orgcell is optimized for iOS and Android mobile browsers. No app installation needed — use it directly in Safari or Chrome, or add it to your home screen for an app-like experience (PWA supported).
landing.faq8Q: Can I use photos already in my Google Drive?
landing.faq8A: Orgcell doesn't create a new Google Drive. It connects to your existing photo folders. No moving or copying files — AI sorts and displays them in your family museum as-is.
